description_long: This object consists of five large plastic beverage bottles, each with a distinct label and color scheme representing popular soft drink brands: Coca-Cola, Fanta (orange and lemon), Sprite, and Pepsi. The bottles are cylindrical with faceted sides, a narrow neck, and a screw cap, each cap colored to match or contrast with the bottle's branding. The labels are detailed, featuring brand logos, product information, and vibrant colors, with the Coca-Cola bottle in red and black, Fanta bottles in orange and yellow, Sprite in green, and Pepsi in blue. The bottles appear to be made of opaque plastic, with no visible contents inside. The overall finish is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of commercial beverage bottles. There are no visible signs of damage or deformation, and the bottles are grouped closely together, suggesting a set.
description: A group of five large, colorful plastic soft drink bottles with detailed branded labels and matching screw caps. Each bottle represents a different popular beverage and features a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five bottles with their branded labels clearly visible: Coca-Cola, Fanta (orange and lemon), Sprite, and Pepsi.
description_view_1: Side view with the bottles aligned in a row, showing the Pepsi bottle's cap and label most prominently, with the others partially obscured behind.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the bottles, revealing barcode and product information labels, with the colored caps visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the Coca-Cola bottle's cap and back label most prominent, the other bottles aligned behind.
attribute_label_or_branding: Visible labels include Coca-Cola (red/white script), Fanta (orange/blue/white with fruit graphics), Sprite (green/white/blue with lemon-lime graphics), and Pepsi (blue/white/red with wave logo). Labels are printed on the bottle midsections.
